task_results.feedback: Perfect! Query is correct and returns the expected result.

task_results.fixed_query: SELECT employees.name, departments.manager FROM employees JOIN departments ON employees.dept_id = departments.id;
task_results.feedback: Perfect! Query is correct and returns the expected result.

task_results.fixed_query: SELECT department, COUNT(*) as high_earners FROM employees WHERE salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM employees) GROUP BY department HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2;
task_results.feedback: Perfect! Query is correct and returns the expected result.

task_results.fixed_query: SELECT name, salary, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) as dept_rank, salary - MAX(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY department) as diff_from_top FROM employees;
task_results.feedback: Perfect! Query is correct and returns the expected result.
